name: 密码登录（文本数学验证码）
description: 适用于带文本数学验证码的密码登录认证页面，包含免责声明勾选

steps.description: 输入密码（自动处理隐藏输入框）
读取文本数学验证码并计算结果填入
steps.script: () => { const exprElem = document.querySelector('#quick_captcha_box'); if (!exprElem) return 'NO_ELEM'; const text = (exprElem.textContent || exprElem.innerText || '').trim(); if (!text) return 'NO_TEXT'; let expr = text.replace(/[×xX]/g, '*').replace(/[÷]/g, '/'); const match = expr.match(/(\d+)\s*([+\-*\/])\s*(\d+)/); if (!match) return 'NO_MATCH:' + text; const a = parseInt(match[1]); const b = parseInt(match[3]); const op = match[2]; let result; if (op === '+') result = a + b; else if (op === '-') result = a - b; else if (op === '*') result = a * b; else if (op === '/') result = b !== 0 ? Math.floor(a / b) : 0; else result = 0; const finalResult = result.toString(); const input = document.querySelector('#quick_captcha_input'); if (input) { input.value = finalResult; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } return finalResult; }
